title: Form → Sheet → Email Notification
problem: Inquiries from contact forms went unanswered for hours because no one was monitoring the spreadsheet, and there was no auto-reply for submitters.
solution: A form-submit trigger that logs every response to Google Sheets, notifies the admin with full context and a direct sheet link, and sends an instant branded auto-reply to the submitter — all with zero external services.
result: Response time dropped from hours to seconds. Every lead is tracked, confirmed, and visible to the team in real time. Pure Google Workspace stack — no subscriptions required.

images.caption: Public Google Form for customer inquiries
Instant admin notification with inquiry details
Automatic logging with status column for tracking
